attributes.magic: PE32 executable (GUI) Intel 80386, for MS Windows

sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Tom U. @c_APT_ure (collection), oscd.community, Jonhnathan Ribeiro

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the usage of binaries such as 'net', 'sc' or 'powershell' in order to stop, pause, disable or delete critical or important Windows services such as AV, Backup, etc. As seen being used in some ransomware scripts
Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Victor Sergeev, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Gleb Sukhodolskiy, Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Tim Shelton, frack113 (split)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the stopping of a Windows service via the "sc.exe" utility
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Jakob Weinzettl, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
